known_follow_ups: x402-bridge sovereignty remediation LANDED (PR #45, 2026-07-13): the bridge is wrapped as a sovereign agent (X402Agent) — cost-accounting ledger (DrawdownLedger/LedgerEntry, append-only JSONL, one entry per paid call, to_signal_event() emission contract mirroring @sovereign/types SignalEvent/RevenueEvent; bus transport deferred — no Python→Kafka client, not faked); documented failure/retry envelope (RetryEnvelope + request_with_retry, bounded exponential backoff mirroring sovereign-bus KafkaBridgeConfig; X402_MAX_CONCURRENT now actually used; User-Agent on the RPC path via envelope_headers); sovereign-agent consumer (X402Agent — managed resource = settlement address, cost flow = ledger, constraint envelope = RetryEnvelope, control surfaces + X402_AGENT_KILL_SWITCH). LEGACY_NON_SOVEREIGN CLEARED per docs/LEGACY_COMPONENTS.md §6. Smoke test GREEN 2026-07-10 (PR #30, eth_blockNumber on monad-mainnet); verified offline by 24/24 tests (funded live smoke re-run by maintainer when ready).

Layer 6 real Llull register + Catalan slot labels LANDED (PR #46, 2026-07-14): the 5-wheel placeholder fixture (shared/fixtures/layer6/wheel-registry.json) was replaced with the sourced register from theo-techno-cosmo/Wheel/8 wheels and 3 domains.docx — the 8 generative wheels (A=Blue Dignities 16, P=Prima Figura 9, E=Elements 22, T=T-Wheel 9 [THEOLOGY+COSMOLOGY], V=Virtues&Vices 13, Q=Questions 17, F=Faculties 6, S=Triangles 3) + 3 structurally-identical domain wheels (Teologia/Kosmologia/Technologia, each 16 segments with the shared Catalan B–R vocabulary). 11 wheels total; wheel-level pair table = the math-honest C(8,2)=28 generative pairs (domain wheels are facets). Schema gained optional per-wheel alphabet (the J-skipping 16-letter B–R sequence, carried explicitly) + labels (per-slot Catalan labels); the loader enforces alphabet.length===size, single-char slots, labels.length===size. The consumer (@sovereign/gnosis-training-data) now emits REAL Catalan labels for A + the 3 domain wheels + F + S (active_slots.*.label is a real string), null for the structured-label wheels (P/T/V/Q/E) pending a richer shape — never fabricated. SPEC CORRECTION (surfaced, not silent — per spec-open-to-higher-standard): the spec's 'PairTable (45 pairs, from a triangular grid image)' is the LETTER-LEVEL Tabula Generalis — 36 Third-Figure cameras C(9,2) + 9 self-pairs (BB…KK) = T₉ = 45 — over the 9 Prima-Figura letters (B–K), NOT a wheel-level pair count; it does not fit the registry's wheel-level pairs field (stays at 28) and is DEFERRED to a follow-up PR as a letter-level composite-validity filter, pending doctrinal confirmation of the 36+9 reconstruction. Surfaced as a NOTE in TTCL_v1_0_BREAKDOWN.md (Wheel Assets + Cardinality sections). The 45 is NOT the 72 Shem↔Goetia name-pairs of the 144 Names (a conflation — the 144 Names are the locate layer, separate from Llull's generate layer; the real 144-Names↔scheduler link is the PPS triad score). Verified: scheduler + gnosis-training-data tsc --noEmit green; pnpm test:integration 222/222; canonical_schedule.json regenerates byte-identical from seed 42; pnpm-lock.yaml untouched; no @sovereign/types change. Deferred to a follow-up PR: the letter-level 45-pair Tabula Generalis table; a richer labels shape for P/T/V/Q/E; a scheduler CLI / W&B tracking.

Layer 7 data-generation consumer LANDED (PR #39): new @sovereign/gnosis-training-data package turns a Layer 6 canonical_schedule into Gnosis training events (JSONL) by reusing @sovereign/ttcl scoreSign — deterministic + byte-reproducible, one event per accepted step; Catalan slot labels are now SOURCED from the registry (PR #46 — real strings for A + the 3 domain wheels + F + S, null for P/T/V/Q/E; at PR #39 they were null pending the asset). Still unbuilt: the full Layer 7 Training Pipeline (SFT→Reward→GRPO→Eval; LLaMA 3.1 8B + QLoRA + HuggingFace TRL) — a real GPU job, deliberately not stubbed. Still open as DATA (not code): the letter-level 45-pair Tabula Generalis table (a deferred follow-up, NOT the wheel-level pair table which is C(8,2)=28). Out of spec scope: a scheduler CLI / W&B tracking.

Layer 7 training-pipeline wiring LANDED (this PR): new root-level gnosis-training/ Python package (uv-managed, sibling to gnostic-engine/) — real SFTTrainer/RewardTrainer/GRPOTrainer + QLoRA configs as runnable code (TTCL_v1_0_BREAKDOWN.md:275-311), import-smoke-verified, CPU-verified. NO training executed — the LLaMA 3.1 8B run is an explicitly-future GPU job (deliberately not stubbed, no fake completion). Every spec silence concretized in generated/hyperparams.py (LoRA r=64/α=128/dropout=0.05, AdamW lr=2e-4 cosine warmup 3%, 4-bit nf4, GRPO β=0.04/ε=0.2/num_generations=8, seed=42, eval thresholds). STAGE-3 OPTIMIZER = GRPO (doctrinal upgrade from PPO; see the NOTE at TTCL_v1_0_BREAKDOWN.md:302) — GRPO is the PPO-family optimizer that drops the learned value model for a group-relative baseline (the DeepSeek-R1/Qwen optimizer). TRL VERSION (modern, no upper cap): trl>=0.15 — TRL removed the PPO stack (PPOConfig/PPOTrainer) after the 0.12-0.13 PPOv2 window (gone by 0.14+ and all 1.x, where SFT/Reward/GRPO/DPO/KTO remain); grpo.py targets the modern GRPOTrainer/GRPOConfig constructor signature (reward_funcs = the Stage-2 reward model; no value model), so the package requires modern TRL with no upper cap (uv sync resolves trl==1.8.0) — GRPO is genuinely runnable, and the doctrinal upgrade is surfaced in the spec NOTE (not a silent substitution). Preference-pair builder emits a bootstrap worksheet (empty responses + rubric scores pre-filled from constitution_score) for a human authoring pass; the reward model still trains on HUMAN-judged pairs (spec line 478), not the scaffold — constitution_score is NOT the RM label / NOT a GRPO reward (seeds the worksheet rubric + gates SFT via passes). W&B/MLflow/DVC + bitsandbytes wired-but-deferred behind opt-in extras (tracking/dvc/qlora). Local-only pytest posture (NO Python added to ci.yml; mirrors gnostic-engine/); pnpm-lock.yaml untouched (uv.lock, not pnpm). Verified: ruff clean, mypy --strict 17 files clean WITH the full ML stack installed (uv sync resolves trl==1.8.0 under the modern-TRL un-pin — the honest green, not absent-deps green; 5 type: ignore[attr-defined] markers on trl re-exports because trl 1.8 ships a typed __init__.pyi that doesn't explicitly list those names — imports resolve at runtime), pytest 67 passed/0 skipped with the stack / 61 passed/2 skipped without (datasets + smoke-imports skip via importorskip — honest), pnpm check:layout green for gnosis-training (only the pre-existing untracked Shaliah Agents/ flagged — not this PR's). Remaining frontier: the full Layer 7 GPU run (SFT→Reward→GRPO→Eval) + human-judged preference pairs + the letter-level 45-pair Tabula Generalis table (a deferred follow-up — the Catalan labels + Theologia wheel landed in PR #46).
